name: Agent Template
description: A reusable OpenClaw template for long-running agent plugins.

scratchDir.description: Ephemeral working directory for session state. Leading ~ is expanded at plugin-register time.

outputDir.description: Durable output directory for run artifacts. Leading ~ is expanded at plugin-register time.

agentName.description: Display name used by the example runner.

defaultDelayMs.description: Default delay between example progress events.
